node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Residual, skip & highway connections is modeled as depending on Affine transforms & dense layers, Algorithms & data structures and feeding downstream nodes such as Multilayer perceptrons, ResNets & DenseNets, U-Nets & encoder–decoder convnets.

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Affine transforms & dense layers, Algorithms & data structures.

dependencies.rationale: Residual, skip & highway connections is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.

In this atlas graph, Residual, skip & highway connections has a `uses` dependency on Algorithms & data structures because Algorithms & data structures is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
